notes: Structural (not cyclical) deceleration across win rate, CAC, NRR and churn while a PE-backed competitor bundles a free substitute. The $40M upmarket bet is premature — Meridian's own two DSO pilots churned in 6 months on the same unaddressed gaps. Verdict: a 90-day evidence sprint, then a $12–18M bridge if it validates — not $40M now.
